zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bedingfield於1428年出生在英國素福爾可丹納姆時，他的父親Sir Edmund Bedingfield28歲，母親Margaret Tudenham Scott24歲。他於大約1443年與Lady Anne de Waldegrave在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1453年10月12日在英國素福爾可貝汀菲兒享年25歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Bedingfield于1428年出生在英国素福爾可丹納姆时，他的父亲Sir Edmund Bedingfield28岁，母亲Margaret Tudenham Scott24岁。他于大约1443年与Lady Anne de Waldegrave在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1453年10月12日在英国素福爾可貝汀菲兒享年25岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

nameMeanings.name: Bedingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of   Beddingfield  .

variants.name: Beddingfield
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from Bedingfield in Suffolk. The placename is recorded in Domesday Book as Bedingefelda, from the Old English personal name Bēda + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bedingfield was born in 1428, in Denham, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Edmund Bedingfield, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Tudenham Scott, was 24. He married Lady Anne de Waldegrave about 1443, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 October 1453, in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 25, and was buried in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bedingfield est né en 1428, à Denham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Bedingfield, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Tudenham Scott, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne de Waldegrave environ 1443, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1453, à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Bedingfield 1428 in Denham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund Bedingfield 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Tudenham Scott 24. Er hat um 1443 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Anne de Waldegrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1453 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bedingfield è nato il nel 1428 nel Denham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Edmund Bedingfield, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Tudenham Scott, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne de Waldegrave circa 1443, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1453, nel Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolto a Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Denham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクデンハム

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bedingfieldが1428年にイギリススフォルクデンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Bedingfieldは28歳，母Margaret Tudenham Scottは24歳であった。約1443年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでLady Anne de Waldegraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1453年10月12日にイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドで25歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bedingfield(이)가 1428년 영국 수폴크 데함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Bedingfield(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Tudenham Scott(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Lady Anne de Waldegrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1453년 10월 12일 영국 수폴크 베딩필드에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베딩필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bedingfield nasceu em 1428, em Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund Bedingfield, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Tudenham Scott, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne de Waldegrave aproximadamente 1443, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1453, em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bedingfield родился в 1428 г. в местности денам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Bedingfield было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Tudenham Scott, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne de Waldegrave около 1443 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 октября 1453 г. в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Bedingfield nació en 1428, en Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edmund Bedingfield, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Tudenham Scott, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Anne de Waldegrave aproximadamente 1443, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1453, en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultado en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
